title: ChillPackV
description: Vanilla modpack for chilling when playing Minecraft
body:
# An optimized and balanced modpack that has everything you need.

Fabric / Quilt modpack to play Minecraft without any problems and with minimal loss of performance.

Do you want to report something? Then write to [Telegram](https://t.me/MuRuLOSE). If the modpack has been changed (mods or configs), then please, before writing, make sure that the error is on my side.

Also write according to this example:
- Modpack version: 
- Steps to reproduce:
- Without logs, no report will be accepted

_**Fabrishot may NOT WORK**_

**_If Minecraft crashes due to continuity, then disable it, the developer replied that the error can only happen if there is no indium, which is in the modpack, so I can’t say anything [ISSUE](https://github.com/PepperCode1/Continuity/issues/436)_**

If the textures behave strangely, turning into a 2D mess, and you have the HMCL launcher, change it. As I understand it, it is not compatible with sodium

## Briefly about the modpack:

More than 50 mods

Several texture packs and shaders

Ready-made configurations of mods and keys
#
